articles.title: '8,000 Jobs'—Polymarket Sees Tech Layoff Surge As Meta AI Push Bites - Forbes
articles.description: Meta plans to cut 8,000 jobs in May as AI capex hits $135B. Polymarket bettors give 77% odds 2026 tech layoffs beat 2025, Q1 already at 96%.
articles.content:
BARCELONA, SPAIN - 2026/03/02: The logo of social media company Meta is seen at the Mobile World Congress 2026 (MWC) at the Fira de Barcelona.
